heading.purpose: Dialog, sheet, and empty-state titles; font-heading font-semibold text-xl leading-none.

body.purpose: Default UI text; controls declare text-base sm:text-sm so narrow/touch windows read larger.

label.purpose: Status pills (sentence case) and section headers (uppercase tracking-wide); always font-medium.

mono.purpose: Terminal surfaces, code, and paths; JetBrains Mono first for deterministic metrics.

shadows.name: surface-edge-shadow
shadows.purpose: Hairline top-edge bevel on raised surfaces (cards, outline buttons, popups).

shadows.name: bevel-highlight
shadows.purpose: 1px inset highlight on solid buttons at rest.

shadows.name: bevel-pressed
shadows.purpose: Replaces the highlight while a solid button is pressed.

shadows.name: composer-shadow
shadows.purpose: Floating composer; pairs with 12px backdrop blur.

shadows.name: overlay-shadow
shadows.purpose: Dialogs and overlay panels — the floating tier.

motion.name: animate-skeleton
motion.purpose: Skeleton shimmer sweep; disabled under reduced motion.

breakpoints.name: sm
breakpoints.purpose: Control sizes and text step down; dialogs stop bottom-sticking.

breakpoints.name: pane-dock
breakpoints.purpose: Right pane docks above this width, sheet below.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single strongest action on a surface; accent fill with bevel highlight.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 36px; padding: 0 11px; border: 1px solid var(--primary, oklch(0.52 0.185 5)); border-radius: 10px; background: var(--primary, oklch(0.52 0.185 5)); color: var(--primary-foreground, #ffffff); font-family: 'DM Sans Variable', -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: inset 0 1px rgb(255 255 255 / 16%), 0 1px 2px oklch(0.553 0.195 38.4 / 0.24); transition: box-shadow 200ms cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--primary, oklch(0.52 0.185 5)) 90%, transparent); } .ds-btn-primary:active { box-shadow: inset 0 1px rgb(0 0 0 / 8%); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px var(--background, #ffffff), 0 0 0 3px var(--ring, oklch(0.52 0.185 5)); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.64; pointer-events: none; box-shadow: none; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Default secondary action; field-line border with the hairline surface-edge bevel.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { position: relative; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 36px; padding: 0 11px; border: 1px solid var(--input, rgb(0 0 0 / 10%)); border-radius: 10px; background: var(--popover, #ffffff); color: var(--foreground, oklch(0.269 0 0)); font-family: 'DM Sans Variable', -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgb(0 0 0 / 5%), var(--surface-edge-shadow, 0 1px rgb(0 0 0 / 4%)); transition: box-shadow 200ms cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent, rgb(0 0 0 / 4%)) 50%, transparent); } .ds-btn-outline:active { box-shadow: none; } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px var(--background, #ffffff), 0 0 0 3px var(--ring, oklch(0.52 0.185 5)); }

components.name: Ghost Icon Button
components.description: Square icon-only control; transparent at rest, four-percent wash on hover; accessible name mandatory.
components.html: <button class="ds-icon-btn" aria-label="Settings"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="3"/><path d="M12 1v2m0 18v2M4.2 4.2l1.4 1.4m12.8 12.8 1.4 1.4M1 12h2m18 0h2M4.2 19.8l1.4-1.4M18.4 5.6l1.4-1.4"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-icon-btn { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 36px; height: 36px; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 10px; background: transparent; color: var(--muted-foreground, oklch(0.556 0 0)); cursor: pointer; transition: background 200ms cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-icon-btn:hover { background: var(--accent, rgb(0 0 0 / 4%)); } .ds-icon-btn:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px var(--background, #ffffff), 0 0 0 3px var(--ring, oklch(0.52 0.185 5)); }

components.name: Solid Badge
components.description: Count or emphasis badge on the action tier; compact rounded-sm unit.
components.css: .ds-badge-solid { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 4px; height: 22px; min-width: 22px; padding: 0 3px; border-radius: 6px; background: var(--primary, oklch(0.52 0.185 5)); color: var(--primary-foreground, #ffffff); font-family: 'DM Sans Variable', -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Success Tint Badge
components.description: Semantic tint badge: 8% hue wash with matching foreground text; info/warning/error follow the same recipe.
components.css: .ds-badge-success { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 4px; height: 22px; min-width: 22px; padding: 0 6px; border-radius: 6px; background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--success, oklch(0.696 0.17 162.48)) 8%, transparent); color: var(--success-foreground, oklch(0.508 0.118 165.612)); font-family: 'DM Sans Variable', -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Status Pill (Working)
components.description: Signature session-status indicator: 6px dot plus sentence-case label; working/connecting pulse, never color-only.
components.css: .ds-status-pill { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; color: var(--status-working, oklch(0.588 0.158 241.966)); font-family: 'DM Sans Variable', -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; } .ds-status-dot-wrap { position: relative; display: flex; width: 6px; height: 6px; } .ds-status-dot { position: relative; display: inline-flex; width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 9999px; background: var(--status-working-dot, oklch(0.685 0.169 237.323)); } .ds-status-ping { position: absolute; display: inline-flex; width: 100%; height: 100%; border-radius: 9999px; background: var(--status-working-dot, oklch(0.685 0.169 237.323)); opacity: 0.75; animation: ds-ping 1s cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1) infinite; } @keyframes ds-ping { 75%, 100% { transform: scale(2); opacity: 0; } } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-status-ping { display: none; } }

components.name: Tooltip
components.description: Popover chip for hover hints; hairline border, edge bevel, label-size text.
components.css: .ds-tooltip { position: relative; display: inline-flex; padding: 4px 8px; border: 1px solid var(--border, rgb(0 0 0 / 8%)); border-radius: 8px; background: var(--popover, #ffffff); color: var(--popover-foreground, oklch(0.269 0 0)); font-family: 'DM Sans Variable', -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; box-shadow: 0 4px 6px rgb(0 0 0 / 5%), var(--surface-edge-shadow, 0 1px rgb(0 0 0 / 4%)); }

components.name: Dialog Surface
components.description: Floating-tier overlay card: 16px radius, hairline border, overlay shadow; the resting-card recipe drops the shadow to the edge bevel.
components.html:
Rename session

Give this session a clearer name.
components.css: .ds-dialog { display: flex; flex-direction: column; max-width: 32rem; border: 1px solid var(--border, rgb(0 0 0 / 8%)); border-radius: 16px; background: var(--popover, #ffffff); color: var(--popover-foreground, oklch(0.269 0 0)); font-family: 'DM Sans Variable', -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; box-shadow: var(--overlay-shadow, 0 16px 40px rgb(0 0 0 / 10%)), var(--surface-edge-shadow, 0 1px rgb(0 0 0 / 4%)); overflow: hidden; } .ds-dialog-header { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; padding: 24px; } .ds-dialog-title { margin: 0; font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1; } .ds-dialog-desc { margin: 0; color: var(--muted-foreground, oklch(0.556 0 0)); font-size: 0.875rem; } .ds-dialog-footer { display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; gap: 8px; padding: 16px 24px; border-top: 1px solid var(--border, rgb(0 0 0 / 8%)); background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--muted, rgb(0 0 0 / 4%)) 72%, transparent); } .ds-dialog-cancel, .ds-dialog-save { height: 36px; padding: 0 11px; border-radius: 10px; font-family: inherit; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; } .ds-dialog-cancel { border: 1px solid var(--input, rgb(0 0 0 / 10%)); background: var(--popover, #ffffff); color: var(--foreground, oklch(0.269 0 0)); } .ds-dialog-cancel:hover { background: var(--accent, rgb(0 0 0 / 4%)); } .ds-dialog-save { border: 1px solid var(--primary, oklch(0.52 0.185 5)); background: var(--primary, oklch(0.52 0.185 5)); color: var(--primary-foreground, #ffffff); box-shadow: inset 0 1px rgb(255 255 255 / 16%); } .ds-dialog-save:hover { background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--primary, oklch(0.52 0.185 5)) 90%, transparent); }

components.name: Skeleton
components.description: Loading placeholder: muted bar with a fixed-attachment highlight sweep; static under reduced motion.
components.css: .ds-skeleton-stack { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; width: 224px; } .ds-skeleton { height: 16px; border-radius: 6px; background: linear-gradient(120deg, transparent 40%, var(--skeleton-highlight, rgb(255 255 255 / 64%)), transparent 60%) var(--muted, rgb(0 0 0 / 4%)) 0 0 / 200% 100% fixed; animation: ds-skeleton 2s ease-in-out infinite; } @keyframes ds-skeleton { from { background-position-x: 200%; } to { background-position-x: 0%; } } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-skeleton { animation: none; } }

narrative.overview:
T4 Code (powered by Oh My Pi) is the observability and control surface for a running agent runtime, and it looks like one: pure neutral light and dark surfaces, a strict two-tier Pi Pink identity, and semantic status hues that are never allowed to blur into brand. The interface carries the confidence of a mature developer tool — dense when the work demands it, quiet when it does not. Nothing decorates; every color, shadow, and motion token reports state. packages/ui/src/tokens.css is the only file allowed to contain raw color values; every component consumes tokens by CSS variable or Tailwind theme class. The product identity is the BrandLockup: the exact OMP pi/plugin mark beside the T4 Code wordmark, with the Powered by Oh My Pi byline reserved for onboarding, about, and the empty welcome.

The system explicitly rejects the generic AI dashboard: no oversized metric cards, no decorative agent graphs, no chat toys. It also deliberately overrides its own interaction reference (T3 Code): no turbulence/grain overlay, no warm cream or paper themes, no glass-card monoculture, no gradient text, no oversized rounding, no decorative side stripes. Surfaces are zero-chroma neutral; the Pi Pink accent appears only where identity or action genuinely lives.

Motion is vocabulary, not spectacle: 150 ms (--motion-duration-fast) palette fade/scale, 200 ms ease-out (--motion-duration-base, cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1)) expand/collapse/sheet/drawer, 500 ms (--motion-duration-slow) meters, ping only on actively live status dots. Theme flips and panel drags suppress all transitions (.no-transitions); reduced motion zeroes every duration token and disables animation entirely.
keyCharacteristics: Pure neutral surface ramps (zero chroma) in both themes; hue appears only with meaning.
Two-tier Pi Pink: #e83174 identity-only, oklch(0.52 0.185 5) contrast-safe action tier (~4.8:1 on white).
Semantic status taxonomy (working/approval/input/plan/done/error) with brand pink banned from it.
Hairline depth: 1px borders, top-edge bevel shadows, near-flat elevation.
4 px spacing grid, 0.625 rem base radius, 48 rem transcript measure, 6 px scrollbars.
Deterministic bundled fonts: DM Sans Variable for UI, JetBrains Mono first in the mono stack.
State-only motion with a full reduced-motion path.

rules.name: The Two-Tier Pink Rule
rules.body: #e83174 is identity; oklch(0.52 0.185 5) is action. Text or fills that must pass contrast never use raw #e83174 in light mode.

rules.name: The Pink-Is-Never-Warning Rule
rules.body: Warning is --warning (amber). Status is the --status-* taxonomy. Pi Pink stays identity, always.

rules.name: The One Token File Rule
rules.body: Raw color values exist only in packages/ui/src/tokens.css. A raw color literal anywhere else is a defect.

rules.name: The One Family Rule
rules.body: DM Sans carries every UI register through weight and size alone; the only second family is the mono, and it belongs to the runtime's output.

rules.name: The Hairline Bevel Rule
rules.body: Rest-state depth is a 1px edge, never a blur. If a resting card casts a visible drop shadow, it is wrong.

rules.name: The Floating-Tier Rule
rules.body: Real shadows belong only to things that float: composer, dialogs, sheets, tooltips, overlays.

dos: Do keep every raw color in packages/ui/src/tokens.css; consume tokens by CSS variable or theme class everywhere else.
Do use oklch(0.52 0.185 5) for accent actions and focus rings in light mode, reserving #e83174 for non-text identity.
Do express state through the fixed status taxonomy and semantic hues — distinct, color-blind-safe, never brand pink.
Do hold the 4px spacing grid, 0.625rem base radius, 1px borders, and hairline bevels.
Do honor reduced motion completely: zero duration tokens, no ping, no smooth scrolling, no transitions during theme flips or drags.
Do keep the right pane closed by default and earn attention with badges; only plan review may auto-open it.
Do pair every status dot with a text label (visible or aria-label) and keep focus rings at 3:1 non-text contrast.
donts: Don't build generic AI workflow dashboards, oversized metric cards, decorative agent graphs, or chat toys.
Don't import T3 Code's cloud, Clerk, relay, billing, or provider assumptions; T3 is an interaction and visual reference, not a product model.

Don't use broad accent washes, pink or orange warning semantics, warm cream or paper themes, glass-card monoculture, gradient text, fake grain, turbulence, or sketch effects — the T3 turbulence/grain overlay is explicitly banned.
Don't add permanent dashboard side panes, modal-first workflows, noisy auto-opening panels, or decorative continuous motion.
Don't scrape terminals, let the renderer own runtime truth, create hidden duplicate settings stores, or send interactive input into an agent-owned shell.
Don't use oversized rounding or decorative side stripes; 16px (--radius-2xl) is the ceiling, and a colored border-left stripe is a defect.
Don't invent lane-specific status colors, a second terminal palette, or any raw color outside tokens.css.
